title: cyperus laevigatus var. distachyos
intro: Cyperus laevigatus var. distachyos, also known as the smooth-flowered umbrella sedge or umbrella sedge, is a plant species belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyperus laevigatus var. distachyos include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
